title: The Frozen Legion
lines: You navigate down a slick, icy tunnel. As your eyes adjust to the gloom, you freeze in terror.
Embedded in the glacial ice all around you are hundreds of zombie farmers.
They are frozen in varying states of decay, their milky eyes staring back at you. Suddenly, you hear the sharp CRACK of splitting ice.

options.desc: Carefully sneak past before the ice shatters
Try to smash a zombie's head while it's trapped
